---
title: "Juliana Walker"
image: "juliana_walker_headshot.jpg"
links:
  - label: LinkedIn
    url: "linkedin.com/in/juliana-walker-589622281"
  - label: GitHub
    url: "https://github.com/jkwalker3"
  - label: Email
    url: "juliana_walker@brown .edu"
output:
  postcards::jolla
---

I am an undergraduate student at Brown University majoring in neuroscience, interested in research that looks at neurological disorders and health equity in research.
